citations.quote: This email contains a copy of the Tenancy Agreement & Code of Conduct please have a thorough read through before we request you electronically sign the tenancy agreement if you decide to accept this offer of accommodation.

findings.text: Email from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra attaches a PDF titled 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' containing the Tenancy Agreement & Code of Conduct.
The attached PDF is approximately 3 MB in size.
The extracted text from the email does not include the content of the attached Student Licence PDF; only the email body was extracted.

proposed_artifacts.content: The email body was successfully extracted. The attached PDF 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB) was not extracted; its content remains unavailable. A follow-up task is needed to extract text from that PDF attachment.
proposed_artifacts.title: Extraction Note for NAP-SRC-0029

proposed_tasks.instructions: Extract text from the PDF attachment 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' attached to email NAP-SRC-0029. The PDF is approximately 3 MB. Use pdf_text extraction method. If OCR is needed, note the requirement.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract text from Student Licence PDF attachment

summary: Extracted email body from NAP-SRC-0029 confirming attachment of 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB) containing Tenancy Agreement & Code of Conduct. PDF content not extracted; follow-up task proposed.

uncertainties.reason: The content of the attached Student Licence PDF was not extracted; only the email body is available.
